entity.label: Shaul
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A king of Edom (Gen. 36:37, 38); called Shaul in 1 Chr. 1:48.

nodes.label: Shaul
nodes.description: A king of Edom (Gen. 36:37, 38); called Shaul in 1 Chr. 1:48.

verses.text: And Samlah died, and Saul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
And Saul died, and Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
And when Shaul was dead, Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
